books.title: The Child of the Cavern
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: An engineer returns to a depleted coal mine at an old friend’s request and investigates mysterious happenings.

books.title: The Story of the Treasure Seekers
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Six siblings search for treasure in order to restore their lost family fortune.

books.title: The Enormous Room
books.author: E. E. Cummings
books.summary: E. E. Cummings describes the experiences of his and his fellow inmates’ imprisonment during World War I.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: Harding’s Luck
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: A poor orphan boy accidentally discovers magic which sends him into the past and leads to his recovery of a fortune and a lordly title.

books.title: All’s Well That Ends Well
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A woman tricks her husband into fulfilling his marriage demands.

books.title: A Doll’s House
books.author: Henrik Ibsen
books.summary: In 1870s Norway, a woman struggles to be herself within the confines of marriage and society.

books.title: Wet Magic
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: A group of children visiting the seaside free a captive mermaid and visit her domain.

books.title: The Ponson Case
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: The death of a wealthy industrialist initially seems like an accident, but soon sparks a murder inquiry.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: A collection of nine short fiction works by influential supernatural and horror author Arthur Machen.

books.title: Travel Essays
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A collection of Robert Louis Stevenson’s travel essays.

books.title: The Starvel Hollow Tragedy
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: A fire that leaves three dead has enough hints of murder to draw our detective up to Yorkshire.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Errico Malatesta
books.summary: A collection of essays by Errico Malatesta.

books.title: Moribund Society and Anarchy
books.author: Jean Grave
books.summary: Jean Grave systemically critiques bourgeois society from an anarchist perspective.

books.title: Festus
books.author: Philip James Bailey
books.summary: A man goes on a quest for knowledge, truth, and understanding in the face of the complexities of existence and spirituality.

books.title: Evelina
books.author: Fanny Burney
books.summary: A young woman navigates the absurdities of 18th-century English society, fends off various suitors, and attempts to establish her true parentage.

books.title: The Skylark of Space
books.author: E. E. Smith
books.summary: A scientist accidentally creates a way to travel to other star systems, while a rival scientist tries to steal all of his work.

books.title: A Thief in the Night
books.author: E. W. Hornung
books.summary: The gentleman thief’s pal reminisces on past adventures in this third collection of A. J. Raffles stories.

books.title: The Kingdom of God Is Within You
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.summary: Tolstoy describes true Christianity as a non-hierarchical, nonviolent, non-coercive pursuit, and criticizes institutional Christianity as a deceptive corruption.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.
